prompt: Can you show me the exact formula behind Net_Income_Y1? I want to see what it's computing and whether it looks right.
assertions: Returns a formula referencing EBIT_Y1 and Tax_Y1 (e.g., '=EBIT_Y1-Tax_Y1')
Explains the formula in plain English: Net Income = EBIT minus Tax
Does NOT fabricate or guess the formula — reads it from the actual model file
